name: Graham Cracker Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham wafer crumbs, melted butter, and spices.
2. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate, 8-inch square cake pan, or 9-inch spring form pan.
3. Chill in the refrigerator for 2 hours before filling.
4. Reserve 2 tablespoons of the crumb mixture to sprinkle on top of the filling (if desired).
9 inches pie crust, 8 servings, excluding filling:
1/2 starch, 1 fat and oil, 7 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram protein, 5 grams fat (77 calories)
Source: Choice Cooking, Canadian Diabetes Association
Shared by Elizabeth Rodier, March 1993. Converted by MMCONV vers. 1.20
